CDF1.formula:
IF(
    OR(
        ISPICKVAL(CustomOpportunity__c.InclusionStage__c, 'Avsluttet'),
        CustomOpportunity__c.TAG_Last_User_Update__c >= TODAY()-30
    ),
    'Yay!', 
'Nay.. (ikke oppdatert siden '& TEXT(TODAY()-30) & ')' )
